title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mphasis - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mphasis - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mphasis in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mphasis:
Mphasis is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis!
